description: CTW classification test fixtures — realistic Chinese/English test data

bilibili_mcp_video.title: Claude Code 最强 MCP 插件推荐！效率翻倍
bilibili_mcp_video.description: B站视频介绍 Claude Code 的 MCP 插件，涵盖安装、配置和使用技巧。展示如何通过 MCP 插件扩展 Claude Code 的功能，包括文件操作、浏览器控制等。
bilibili_mcp_video.content: 今天给大家推荐几个 Claude Code 的 MCP 插件... 首先是 filesystem MCP，它可以让 Claude 直接操作文件系统... 安装步骤很简单，先 npm install... 配置完后重启 Claude Code 就能用了...

github_prefect.title: Prefect - Python workflow orchestration
github_prefect.description: GitHub 仓库：Prefect 是一个 Python 工作流编排框架，用于构建、运行和监控数据管道。源码包括核心引擎、任务调度、状态管理、UI 仪表盘等模块。
github_prefect.content: Prefect is a workflow orchestration tool. Core architecture: Flow → Task → State. The engine uses Dask for distributed execution. Key modules: prefect.engine, prefect.tasks, prefect.schedules. Design patterns: Task-based DAG, State machine for lifecycle management, Plugin system for extensibility.

pdf_paper.title: Attention Is All You Need
pdf_paper.description: Google 团队的 Transformer 架构论文。提出完全基于注意力机制的序列转导模型，在机器翻译任务上达到 SOTA。引入了 Multi-Head Attention 和 Positional Encoding 等关键创新。
pdf_paper.content: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks... We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms... Experiments on two machine translation tasks show the Transformer is superior in quality while being more parallelizable...

security_cve.title: CVE-2024-3094: XZ Utils Backdoor Supply Chain Attack
security_cve.description: Critical CVE 漏洞通告。XZ Utils 5.6.0/5.6.1 被植入后门，影响 liblzma 库，可绕过 sshd 认证。CVSS 评分 10.0 CRITICAL。
security_cve.content: CVE-2024-3094 is a critical supply chain vulnerability in XZ Utils versions 5.6.0 and 5.6.1. A malicious backdoor was discovered in the liblzma library that could allow remote code execution... The backdoor interferes with sshd authentication... Affected systems: x86-64 Linux with glibc, specifically Debian/RPM based distributions...

n8n_tutorial.title: n8n 自动化工作流实战教程：从零搭建 AI Agent 工作流
n8n_tutorial.description: YouTube 视频教程，手把手教你使用 n8n 搭建 AI Agent 自动化工作流。从安装开始，到创建第一个 workflow，再到集成 LLM 节点，最终构建完整的 AI Agent 管线。
n8n_tutorial.content: 今天我们来一步步搭建一个 AI Agent 工作流。第一步：安装 n8n... 第二步：创建第一个 workflow... 第三步：添加 HTTP Webhook 触发器... 第四步：集成 OpenAI 节点... 第五步：添加 Code 节点处理逻辑... 最后测试运行... 完整代码在 GitHub...

experience_blog.title: How We Scaled PostgreSQL to 1M QPS — Lessons Learned
experience_blog.description: 团队博客分享在生产环境中将 PostgreSQL 扩展到 100万 QPS 的真实经验和踩坑记录。包含连接池配置、索引优化、分区策略等实操经验。
experience_blog.content: Last year our team faced a challenge: scale PostgreSQL from 10K to 1M QPS. Here's what we learned... Mistake #1: Default connection pooling settings are terrible for high concurrency. We switched to PgBouncer in transaction mode... Mistake #2: Missing indexes on JSONB columns cost us 10x query time... The counterintuitive lesson: sometimes adding more replicas makes things worse due to replication lag...

ai_agent_framework.title: crewAI - Framework for orchestrating role-playing AI agents
ai_agent_framework.description: crewAI 是一个 AI Agent 编排框架，支持角色扮演、任务委派和工具集成。核心概念：Agent、Task、Crew、Tool。通过定义 Agent 的角色和目标，自动协调多 Agent 协作。
ai_agent_framework.content: crewAI is a cutting-edge framework for orchestrating autonomous AI agents. Key features: Role-based agent design, Inter-agent delegation, Flexible task management, Integration with LangChain tools. Architecture: Each agent has a role, goal, and backstory. Tasks are assigned to agents. Crews manage the execution flow...

mcp_spec_standard.title: Model Context Protocol Specification
mcp_spec_standard.description: MCP 协议官方规范文档。定义了客户端-服务器架构、JSON-RPC 消息格式、传输层、工具发现和调用机制等核心规范。
mcp_spec_standard.content: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open protocol that standardizes how applications provide context to LLMs. This specification defines: JSON-RPC 2.0 message format, Client-Server architecture, Transport layer (stdio/SSE), Tool discovery and invocation, Resource templates, Prompt templates... Protocol version: 2024-11-05, Status: Draft...

tool_review_blog.title: 2024 API Gateway 横评：Kong vs Traefik vs APISIX vs Envoy
tool_review_blog.description: 技术博客对新晋 API 网关进行系统性评测和对比。从性能、功能、易用性、社区生态等维度对比 4 个主流 API 网关。
tool_review_blog.content: We benchmarked 4 popular API gateways in 2024: Kong, Traefik, APISIX, and Envoy. Test methodology: 10K concurrent connections, mixed HTTP/gRPC traffic... Results: APISIX leads in raw throughput... Kong has the richest plugin ecosystem... Traefik is the easiest to configure... Envoy is the most flexible but complex... Recommendation: For startups → Traefik, for enterprise → Kong...

tech_news_release.title: OpenAI 发布 GPT-4o：免费多模态大模型
tech_news_release.description: OpenAI 发布 GPT-4o 模型，支持文本、图像、音频多模态处理，免费向所有用户开放。速度提升 2 倍，成本降低 50%。
tech_news_release.content: OpenAI announced GPT-4o, our new flagship model that can reason across audio, vision, and text in real time. GPT-4o is 2x faster and 50% cheaper than GPT-4 Turbo... Available to all ChatGPT users, including free tier... API access rolling out over the coming weeks...
